case_title: GIORGIO DI BERNARDO VS. SHEYLA BOLTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DI BERNARDO, GIORGIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLTON, SHEYLA $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,965.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
